title: The Whisper Game
body: Whisper something you find attractive about your partner — but only using three words or fewer.

title: Stolen Kiss
body: Kiss your partner somewhere unexpected — not the lips. Let them guess where you'll go next.

title: Truth or Tease
body: Ask your partner a flirty question. If they refuse to answer, they owe you a 10-second massage anywhere you choose.

title: Blindfold Guess
body: One partner closes their eyes. The other touches them with three different objects. Guess what each one is.

title: Dance for Me
body: Put on your partner's favorite song and give them a 60-second dance. Bonus points for eye contact.

title: The Compliment Trap
body: Take turns giving increasingly bold compliments. First one to blush or look away loses — and the winner picks the next dare.

title: Wardrobe Swap
body: Each partner picks one item of clothing for the other to remove. Then one item to put on differently.

title: Two-Minute Tease
body: You have exactly two minutes to make your partner laugh AND blush. Any method allowed except tickling.

title: Fantasy Charades
body: Act out a secret fantasy without words. Your partner has three guesses. If they get it right, you do it tonight.

title: The Forfeit Game
body: Play rock-paper-scissors best of 3. The loser must do whatever the winner whispers in their ear — within your agreed boundaries.

title: Honest Confession
body: Tell your partner the last time they made you feel genuinely desired. Be specific — what did they do, and why did it hit you so hard?

title: The Stare
body: Hold eye contact with your partner for 60 seconds in complete silence. No laughing. Let the tension build.

title: Commanding Voice
body: Tell your partner exactly where to put their hands. Use a firm, deliberate voice. Guide them for two full minutes.

title: Written Permission
body: Write down one thing you want from your partner tonight on a piece of paper. Fold it. Exchange papers simultaneously.

title: Power Reversal
body: The partner who usually takes the lead must surrender all control for the next 5 minutes. The other partner decides everything.

title: One Word Command
body: Give your partner a single-word command. They must obey immediately. Then they give you one. Alternate five times.

title: Edge of Restraint
body: One partner holds the other's wrists gently but firmly above their head for 90 seconds. Maintain eye contact throughout.

title: The Denial Game
body: One partner teases the other to the edge of their patience — then stops. Wait 30 seconds. Repeat three times before allowing release.

title: Dark Whisper
body: Lean close to your partner's ear and describe in vivid detail what you want to do to them. Don't hold back. Don't touch — just words.

title: Complete Surrender
body: One partner lies still and gives the other full control for 10 minutes. The active partner explores freely within pre-agreed boundaries. Use the check-in button.

title: Feather Touch
body: Trace your fingertip slowly along your partner's arm from wrist to shoulder. Take at least 30 seconds. Feel every inch.

title: Breathe Together
body: Sit facing each other, foreheads touching. Synchronize your breathing for two minutes. Inhale together. Exhale together.

title: Slow Massage
body: Give your partner a 5-minute hand and forearm massage using slow, deliberate pressure. Focus on every finger individually.

title: Scent Memory
body: Close your eyes and breathe in your partner's neck. Tell them what the scent reminds you of — a memory, a feeling, a place.

title: Ice and Warmth
body: Alternate between pressing an ice cube and your warm lips against your partner's skin. Let them experience the contrast.

title: Candlelight Map
body: In candlelight, slowly trace a path across your partner's body with your fingertip. They tell you when you've found a spot that makes them shiver.

title: Full Body Worship
body: Spend 10 minutes appreciating your partner's body with words and gentle touch. Start from their feet and work upward. Name what you love about each part.

title: Silk Blindfold
body: Blindfold your partner with something soft. Kiss five different spots on their body, each kiss lasting 10 seconds. They describe what they feel after each one.

title: Melting Point
body: Using warm massage oil, give your partner a full back massage that gradually extends to their entire body. Move impossibly slowly. Let every stroke last.

title: The Longest Kiss
body: Kiss your partner for a full five minutes without stopping. Start gentle, let it evolve naturally. No hands for the first two minutes.
